lines.speaker: Banker
lines.text: Good day, how may I help you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to buy more bank slots.

lines.speaker: Banker
lines.text: Why? You don't use the bank.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh yeah... Never mind then.

lines.speaker: Banker
lines.text: I can sell you up to [number] additional bank slots in sets of 40. How many are you interested in buying?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: [number] slots please.

lines.speaker: Banker
lines.text: Buying [number] additional bank slots will cost [number] coins. Be warned, this purchase is not reversible. Are you happy to proceed?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh... I don't seem to have enough money for that. Never mind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, I'm happy with that.

lines.speaker: Banker
lines.text: Your additional bank slots have been added.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually, I've changed my mind.

lines.speaker: Banker
lines.text: I'm afraid not! You've already got as much bank space as you can obtain without purchase.

lines.speaker: Banker
lines.text: I can sell you up to [number] additional bank slots in sets of 40. How many are you interested in buying?

lines.speaker: Banker
lines.text: I'm not supposed to tell you this, but you can obtain more bank space by [setting up a PIN], [setting up an Authenticator] [or] [upgrading to a Jagex Account].

lines.speaker: Banker
lines.text: I can sell you up to [number] additional bank slots in sets of 40. How many are you interested in buying?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually, I've changed my mind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are you doing out here?

lines.speaker: Banker
lines.text: Well, we at the Bank of Gielinor are keen to make sure that our services are always easily accessible. That includes making ourselves available in the more remote parts of the sea.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: And the crab?

lines.speaker: Banker
lines.text: Ah, yes. I don't really have a good answer to that to be honest, but he is very helpful.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see...
